## Integration Type

What type of integration is this about?
- [ ] Sharing a new integration example
- [ ] Requesting an integration example
- [ ] Improving existing integration documentation
- [ ] Reporting issue with integration

## Platform / Protocol

Which platform or protocol is this integration for?

- [ ] AdCP (Ad Context Protocol)
- [ ] AAMP (Agentic Advertising Management Protocols)
- [ ] OpenRTB
- [ ] OpenDirect
- [ ] MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- [ ] A2A (Agent2Agent Protocol)
- [ ] DSP platform: _____________
- [ ] SSP platform: _____________
- [ ] Data provider platform: _____________
- [ ] Other: _____________

## Integration Description

Provide a clear description of the integration:

### What Does This Integration Do?

Describe the purpose and functionality of this integration.

### How Does It Work?

Explain the technical implementation at a high level.

### Key Benefits

What are the main benefits of this integration?

If you're requesting an integration example, please provide:

### Current Approach

What improvements do you suggest?

### Why This Improvement Is Needed

## Checklist

- [ ] I have provided a clear description
- [ ] I have specified the platform/protocol
- [ ] I have included code examples (if sharing)
- [ ] I have described the use case (if requesting)
- [ ] I have tested the integration (if sharing)
- [ ] I have reviewed existing integration documentation
